title: cyathula prostrata var. prostrata
intro: Cyathula prostrata var. prostrata, also known as the creeping water-primrose, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, while also being used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Cyathula prostrata var. prostrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
